query: SELECT id, fileName, status, LENGTH(abcNotation) as abc_length, SUBSTRING(abcNotation, 1, 200) as abc_start, RIGHT(abcNotation, 200) as abc_end FROM mp3_sheet_jobs WHERE status = 'done' ORDER BY createdAt DESC LIMIT 5;
